# Implantik by Dr. Chirap

> Dental implant and dentistry clinic in Iași, Romania.

## Clinic
- Name: Implantik by Dr. Chirap
- City: Iași, Romania
- Address: Strada Milcov nr. 2, bl. 1206, sc. D, Iași 700581
- Phone: +40 758 169 234
- Email: implantikdrchirap@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8:00–19:30; Saturday & Sunday closed
- Coordinates: 47.1598596, 27.5710137

## Lead physician
- Dr. Ionuț Chirap — oral and maxillofacial surgeon (chirurgie orală și maxilo-facială)
- Over 7,000 dental implants placed
- Services: single implants, All-on-4/All-on-6, sinus lift, bone grafting, complex oral rehabilitation

## Services (summary)
- Implantologie / Dental implants — personalized treatment plans, Nobel Biocare, Megagen AnyRidge, AlphaBio
- All-on-4 & All-on-6 — full-arch rehabilitation on implants in Iași
- Chirurgie orală și maxilo-facială / Oral surgery — sinus lift, bone grafting, wisdom teeth, complex extractions
- Reabilitări complexe / Complex rehabilitation — severe bone loss, failed implants, phased plans
- Protetică dentară / Dental prosthetics — crowns, bridges, implant-supported prostheses
- Ortodonție / Orthodontics — metal braces, sapphire braces, Spark clear aligners
- Stomatologie / General dentistry — consultations, fillings, scaling and hygiene
- Estetică dentară / Dental aesthetics — veneers, professional whitening
- Estetică facială / Facial aesthetics — hyaluronic acid and botulinum toxin (medical setting)
- Stomatologie fără bariere / Dentistry without barriers — transparent care for young adults

## Main pages (RO)
- https://implantik.ro/ro — Home
- https://implantik.ro/ro/implantologie — Dental implants Iași
- https://implantik.ro/ro/implant-all-on-4-iasi — All-on-4 Iași
- https://implantik.ro/ro/chirurgie-orala — Oral and maxillofacial surgery (includes sinus lift)
- https://implantik.ro/ro/reabilitari-complexe — Complex oral rehabilitation
- https://implantik.ro/ro/protetica-dentara — Dental prosthetics
- https://implantik.ro/ro/ortodontie — Orthodontics Iași
- https://implantik.ro/ro/stomatologie — General dentistry Iași
- https://implantik.ro/ro/estetica-dentara — Dental aesthetics
- https://implantik.ro/ro/estetica-faciala — Facial aesthetics
- https://implantik.ro/ro/preturi — Pricing (official clinic price list, RO)
- https://implantik.ro/en/prices — Pricing (official clinic price list, EN)
- https://implantik.ro/ro/echipa/dr-ionut-chirap — Dr. Ionuț Chirap
- https://implantik.ro/ro/ghiduri — Patient guides
- https://implantik.ro/ro/contact — Contact
- https://implantik.ro/ro/programare — Book appointment

## English
- https://implantik.ro/en — English home
- Same paths under /en/ for all service pages above

## Languages
- Romanian (default): /ro/
- English: /en/

## Notes
- Prices are indicative; exact costs are provided in a written treatment plan at consultation.
- No promotional offers or discount campaigns are published on the website.
- Sinus lift content is on /chirurgie-orala; a dedicated /sinus-lift-iasi page is planned for phase 2.
